name: Pechugas Mision (Mission-style Chicken Breasts)
recipeIngredient: 4 whole skinless boneless chicken breasts, halved
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare chipotle paste: Soak the chipotle chiles in water overnight. Drain, open and remove seeds and veins. In a blender, process the chiles, garlic, salt, and pepper. Heat oil in a deep saucepan and fry the mixture. Cook, stirring constantly, until thick (about 1 hour). Remove from heat.
2. Prepare chicken breasts: Heat oil in a saucepan and sauté onion. Season chicken breast with salt and pepper, then fry on both sides. Mix sour cream and chipotle paste. Add the mixture to the saucepan. Add chicken bouillon powder and grated cheese. Cook for 10 minutes.
3. To serve, place chicken breast on plate, cover with sauce, garnish with steamed vegetables, and refried beans sprinkled with cotija or Parmesan cheese.
